overview: GlintChat is a privacy-focused, real-identity chat app with direct and group messaging, 24-hour status updates, official channels, and a private admin earnings dashboard. Users sign up with their real name and phone number only. Features include voice message recording with playback, photo/video sharing, live voice/video calling, and a $6 Stripe verification badge.
features: Real-identity signup with real name and phone number — no usernames
Voice message recording (hold-to-record, release-to-send) with play bar in chat bubbles
Photo and video sharing from device gallery with persistent storage
Live voice and video calling via Daily.co or Agora
Get Verified page with $6 Stripe payment and automatic blue checkmark
Private Earnings Dashboard for admin with payout request
Admin-only access control enforced by account principal check
Privacy policy: no tracking, selling, or analyzing user data
